name: Student Housing Lease Agreement (Co-Tenancy)
description: A residential lease designed for multiple students sharing a house or apartment, highlighting joint liability and house rules.
content:
STUDENT HOUSING LEASE AGREEMENT

This Student Housing Lease Agreement (the "Lease") is made on {{formatDate signature_date}} by and between the Landlord and the Tenants named below.

1. THE PARTIES

A. LANDLORD
Name/Company: {{landlord_name}}
Address: {{landlord_address}}
Email / Phone: {{landlord_contact}}

B. TENANTS (Jointly and Severally Liable)

The following individuals are collectively referred to as the "Tenant" and are jointly and severally liable for all obligations under this Lease:

{{#each tenants}}

Name: {{this.full_name}}

ID/Passport: {{this.id_number}}

Phone: {{this.phone}}

{{/each}}

2. LEASED PREMISES

Property Address: {{property_address}}
Description (Rooms/Type): {{property_description}}

3. TERM OF LEASE

Lease Term: {{lease_duration_months}} Months
Commencement Date: {{formatDate start_date}}
Expiration Date: {{formatDate end_date}}

4. RENT AND PAYMENT

Total Monthly Rent: {{total_monthly_rent}}
Rent Due Date: The {{due_day}} day of each month.
Payment Method: {{payment_method}}
Joint and Several Liability: Each Tenant is individually responsible for the entire rent amount. How the Tenants divide the rent among themselves is not the responsibility of the Landlord.

5. SECURITY DEPOSIT

The Tenants have paid a total Security Deposit of {{security_deposit}}. The deposit will be returned within the legal timeframe after move-out, minus any deductions for damages or unpaid rent. It will be returned as follows: {{deposit_return_method}}.

6. UTILITIES AND MAINTENANCE

The Tenants are jointly responsible for paying the following utilities and services: {{tenant_utilities}}. The Landlord shall cover: {{landlord_utilities}}.

7. HOUSE RULES & SPECIAL CONDITIONS

  • Occupancy is restricted exclusively to the Tenants listed in this Lease.
  • Smoking Policy: {{smoking_policy}}
  • Pet Policy: {{pet_policy}}
  • Quiet Hours & Parties: Tenants must not disturb neighbors. Large parties or disruptive gatherings are prohibited.
  • Cleanliness: Tenants are responsible for maintaining the cleanliness of the property, properly disposing of trash, and preventing pest infestations.
    • {{#if special_rules}}
  • Additional Rules: 
    {{special_rules}}
    • {{/if}}

8. GUARANTORS (CO-SIGNERS)

{{#if (eq requires_guarantor 'Yes')}}

This Lease is contingent upon the execution of a separate Guarantor Agreement by the parents/guardians of the Tenants, guaranteeing the financial obligations herein.

{{else}}

No external Guarantors are required for this Lease.

{{/if}}

By signing below, the Landlord and all Tenants agree to the terms of this Lease.

Landlord:
{{landlord_name}}

Signature: _________________________


Tenants:

{{#each tenants}}

{{this.full_name}}


Signature: _________________________

{{/each}}

fields.name: payment_method
fields.label: Payment Method & Details
fields.placeholder: e.g., Venmo, Bank Transfer to Zelle

fields.name: deposit_return_method
fields.label: How will the deposit be returned?
fields.placeholder: e.g., Divided equally among tenants, Sent to Tenant 1
